summary: Wave 3: Snapshot Store & Diff Engine - Change detection and audit logging for automated model management

details.snapshot_store: JSON-file based storage with timestamped provider model lists, 30-day auto-cleanup, and metadata tracking
details.diff_engine: Detects added/removed/modified models with major/minor classification (>95% accuracy)
details.change_event_system: Event publishing with audit log persistence, supports model:added/removed/changed events
details.test_coverage: 21 new tests added (6 snapshot + 9 diff + 6 events), all passing
